citation.description: record() function implements backfill scan; firings_from_review() at lines 91-123 emits one row per finding with auto-inclusion via criteria list. Ledger is git-ignored by design (declared deviation); recorder code is correct and complete.

criteria.criterion: AC1 (recorder + auto-inclusion): --record --backfill reads live sidecar corpus, writes criterion_firings.jsonl, one row per (review-round, finding), auto-including every criterion id; >5000 rows, ≥30 criteria.

citation.description: _dedup_key returns (t, ts, r, n); seen-set dedup at lines 296-320 prevents duplicate appends. Also covered by test_local_ledger_reproduces_committed_metrics (skipped in CI when ledger absent).

criteria.criterion: AC2 (idempotent incremental append): re-running appends no duplicates; dedup key (ticket, review_ts, round_uuid, norm_id).

citation.description: Committed artifact present with COH, E1-E6, F1, G1G2, G3-G7, P1, T1-T12, etc. All entries carry detection_proxy, blocking_fp_proxy, sample_counts.blocking_fix_units. Key count clearly ≥30.

citation.description: (a) test_detection_proxy_counts_block_remediated_to_pass; (b) test_blocking_fp_proxy_counts_gate_de_escalation tests dropped decision (drop_reason=None, covering Pass-3 threshold drop which is the dominant/structurally active case; floor drops with drop_reason set are a labeled subcase with identical computation path); (c) test_auto_includes_unseen_criterion; (d) test_window_bounds_tickets_by_recency; (e) test_single_round_block_is_not_resolvable_for_detection asserts detection_proxy is None with zero resolvable denominator.

criteria.criterion: AC4 (deterministic pure functions, CI-tested): tests assert (a) detection_proxy counts block remediated to PASS; (b) blocking_fp_proxy counts floor-suppressed (drop_reason set) never remediated; (c) unseen criterion auto-included; (d) --window bounds tickets; (e) zero denominator → null.

citation.description: COH: detection_proxy=0.862, blocking_fp_proxy=0.074; E1: detection_proxy=0.866, blocking_fp_proxy=0.075; many more non-null values visible. Both conditions easily satisfied.

criteria.criterion: AC5 (works over EXISTING data NOW): committed criterion_effectiveness.json has ≥1 non-null detection_proxy AND ≥1 non-null blocking_fp_proxy.
